docs.title: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Information Security Management System Schema
docs.text:
A comprehensive LinkML schema modeling the requirements, clauses, and Annex A controls of ISO/IEC 27001:2022. Designed for open data publication, automated validation, and integration with governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) systems. This schema captures: - ISMS lifecycle (establish, implement, maintain, improve) - Risk assessment and treatment processes (Clause 6.1) - All 93 Annex A controls organized by domain - Audit, measurement, and continual improvement artifacts

URI: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001

Name: iso27001

docs.title: Subset: AnnexAControls
docs.text:
Classes and enumerations representing the 93 controls in Annex A, organized into four domains: organizational, people, physical, technological.

URI: AnnexAControls

docs.text:

  • Used in Statement of Applicability (SoA) generation

docs.title: Enum: AuditFindingType
docs.text:
Classification of internal audit findings.

URI: iso27001:AuditFindingType

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description major_nonconformity None Significant failure to fulfill a requirement that affects ISMS capability to ... minor_nonconformity None Isolated lapse that does not significantly affect ISMS effectiveness observation None Noted condition that could lead to nonconformity if not addressed positive_finding None Evidence of effective implementation exceeding requirements

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description finding_type Type of audit finding

docs.text: • PerformanceEvaluation

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: AuditFindingType
description: Classification of internal audit findings.
in_subset:
- performance_evaluation
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  major_nonconformity:
    text: major_nonconformity
    description: Significant failure to fulfill a requirement that affects ISMS capability
      to achieve intended outcomes.
  minor_nonconformity:
    text: minor_nonconformity
    description: Isolated lapse that does not significantly affect ISMS effectiveness.
  observation:
    text: observation
    description: Noted condition that could lead to nonconformity if not addressed.
    aliases:
    - opportunity_for_improvement
  positive_finding:
    text: positive_finding
    description: Evidence of effective implementation exceeding requirements.

docs.title: Subset: ContinualImprovement
docs.text:
Elements for nonconformity management, corrective actions, and improvement tracking per Clause 10.

URI: ContinualImprovement

docs.title: Comments
docs.text:
• Links nonconformities to root causes and corrective actions
  • Tracks improvement opportunities

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001

docs.title: Classes in subset
docs.text: Class Description CorrectiveAction A corrective action per Clause 10 ImprovementOpportunity An opportunity for continual improvement per Clause 10 Nonconformity A nonconformity identified per Clause 10

  iso27002_mapping:

  to Clauses 5-8 of ISO/IEC 27002:2022.
in_subset:

from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
rank: 1000

        tag: annex_clause
        value: '5'
      control_count:
        tag: control_count
        value: '37'
  people:
    text: people
    description: People controls (Annex A.6) — screening, employment terms, awareness,
      disciplinary process, termination responsibilities, remote working.
    annotations:
      annex_clause:
        tag: annex_clause
        value: '6'
      control_count:
        tag: control_count
        value: '8'
  physical:
    text: physical
    description: Physical controls (Annex A.7) — perimeters, entry controls, equipment
      protection, secure areas, media handling, cabling, maintenance.
    annotations:
      annex_clause:
        tag: annex_clause
        value: '7'
      control_count:
        tag: control_count
        value: '14'
  technological:

    description: Technological controls (Annex A.8) — endpoint security, access restrictions,
      authentication, malware protection, logging, cryptography, secure development.
    annotations:
      annex_clause:
        tag: annex_clause
        value: '8'
      control_count:
        tag: control_count
        value: '34'

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: DocumentType
description: Categories of documented information required or recommended by ISO 27001.
in_subset:
- documented_information
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  policy:
    text: policy
    description: High-level statement of intent and direction (e.g., IS policy per
      5.2).
  procedure:
    text: procedure
    description: Documented steps for performing activities consistently.
  standard:
    text: standard
    description: Mandatory requirements for specific technologies or processes.
  guideline:
    text: guideline
    description: Recommended practices that support policies and procedures.
  record:
    text: record
    description: Evidence of activities performed or results achieved.
  plan:
    text: plan
    description: Documented approach for achieving objectives (e.g., risk treatment
      plan).
  report:
    text: report
    description: Formal output of assessment, audit, or review activities.

docs.title: Subset: DocumentedInformation
docs.text:
Classes representing required documented information per Clause 7.5. Supports document control and retention requirements.

URI: DocumentedInformation

docs.title: Comments
docs.text:
• Includes policies, procedures, records, and evidence
  • Tracks version control and approval status

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001

docs.title: Enum: ImpactRating
docs.text:
Qualitative impact scale for risk assessment.

URI: iso27001:ImpactRating

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description negligible None No significant impact on operations or objectives minor None Limited impact, easily absorbed by normal operations moderate None Noticeable impact requiring management intervention major None Serious impact on objectives, reputation, or compliance severe None Catastrophic impact threatening organizational viability

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description impact Assessed impact if risk materializes

docs.title: In Subsets
docs.text: • RiskManagement

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: ImpactRating
description: Qualitative impact scale for risk assessment.
in_subset:
- risk_management
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  negligible:
    text: negligible
    description: No significant impact on operations or objectives.
    annotations:
      numeric_value:
        tag: numeric_value
        value: '1'
  minor:
    text: minor
    description: Limited impact, easily absorbed by normal operations.
    annotations:
      numeric_value:
        tag: numeric_value
        value: '2'
  moderate:
    text: moderate
    description: Noticeable impact requiring management intervention.
    annotations:
      numeric_value:
        tag: numeric_value
        value: '3'
  major:
    text: major
    description: Serious impact on objectives, reputation, or compliance.
    annotations:
      numeric_value:
        tag: numeric_value
        value: '4'
  severe:
    text: severe
    description: Catastrophic impact threatening organizational viability.
    annotations:
      numeric_value:
        tag: numeric_value
        value: '5'

docs.title: Enum: ImplementationStatus
docs.text:
Lifecycle status of a security control, used in Statement of Applicability and control tracking.

URI: iso27001:ImplementationStatus

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description not_started None Control identified but no implementation activities begun planned None Control scheduled for implementation with defined timeline in_progress None Implementation actively underway but not yet complete implemented None Control fully implemented and operational not_applicable None Control excluded from scope with documented justification per 6

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description implementation_status Current implementation status

docs.title: In Subsets
docs.text: • AnnexAControls

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: ImplementationStatus
description: Lifecycle status of a security control, used in Statement of Applicability
  and control tracking.
in_subset:
- annex_a_controls
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  not_started:
    text: not_started
    description: Control identified but no implementation activities begun.
  planned:
    text: planned
    description: Control scheduled for implementation with defined timeline.
  in_progress:
    text: in_progress
    description: Implementation actively underway but not yet complete.
  implemented:
    text: implemented
    description: Control fully implemented and operational.
  not_applicable:
    text: not_applicable
    description: Control excluded from scope with documented justification per 6.1.3
      d).
    comments:
    - Requires justification in Statement of Applicability

docs.title: Class: InformationSecurityEvent
docs.text:
An information security event per A.5.25, which may or may not be categorized as an incident.

URI: iso27001:InformationSecurityEvent

 classDiagram
    class InformationSecurityEvent
    click InformationSecurityEvent href "../InformationSecurityEvent/"
      NamedEntity <|-- InformationSecurityEvent
        click NamedEntity href "../NamedEntity/"

      InformationSecurityEvent : affected_assets





        InformationSecurityEvent --> "*" Asset : affected_assets
        click Asset href "../Asset/"



      InformationSecurityEvent : categorized_as_incident

      InformationSecurityEvent : created_date

      InformationSecurityEvent : description

      InformationSecurityEvent : event_datetime

      InformationSecurityEvent : event_description

      InformationSecurityEvent : id

      InformationSecurityEvent : initial_assessment

      InformationSecurityEvent : linked_incident





        InformationSecurityEvent --> "0..1" InformationSecurityIncident : linked_incident
        click InformationSecurityIncident href "../InformationSecurityIncident/"



      InformationSecurityEvent : modified_date

      InformationSecurityEvent : name

      InformationSecurityEvent : reporter

      InformationSecurityEvent : version

docs.title: Class: InformationSecurityObjective
docs.text:
A measurable information security objective per Clause 6.2, established at relevant functions and levels of the organization.

URI: iso27001:InformationSecurityObjective

    click InformationSecurityObjective href "../InformationSecurityObjective/"

      InformationSecurityObjective : target_value

docs.title: Class: InformationSecurityPolicy
docs.text:
The information security policy established by top management per Clause 5.2. Provides framework for setting objectives and demonstrates commitment.

docs.title: Class: InterestedParty
docs.text:
A stakeholder whose needs and expectations are relevant to the ISMS per 4.2. Includes internal parties (employees, management) and external parties (customers, regulators, suppliers).

URI: iso27001:InterestedParty

 classDiagram

      InterestedParty : requirements

      InterestedParty : version

docs.title: Subset: IsmsCore
docs.text:
Core ISMS structural elements required for conformity with Clauses 4-10. These classes represent the minimum viable data model for ISMS documentation.

URI: IsmsCore

docs.title: Comments
docs.text:
• Mandatory for any ISO 27001 conformance dataset
  • Maps to "shall" requirements in the standard

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001

docs.title: Classes in subset
docs.text: Class Description AwarenessProgram The awareness program ensuring personnel understand their information securit... CommunicationItem A single communication requirement within the communication plan CommunicationPlan Plan for internal and external communications relevant to the ISMS per Clause... CompetenceRecord Evidence of competence for personnel affecting information security performan... InformationSecurityManagementSystem Top-level container representing an organization's complete ISMS per ISO 2700... InformationSecurityObjective A measurable information security objective per Clause 6 InformationSecurityPolicy The information security policy established by top management per Clause 5 InterestedParty A stakeholder whose needs and expectations are relevant to the ISMS per 4 Organization The organization establishing and operating the ISMS Resource A resource provided for the ISMS per Clause 7 Role An information security role with defined responsibilities and authorities pe... StatementOfApplicability The Statement of Applicability (SoA) per 6

docs.title: Enum: LikelihoodRating
docs.text:
Qualitative likelihood scale for risk assessment.

URI: iso27001:LikelihoodRating

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description rare None Highly unlikely to occur (< 5% probability) unlikely None Not expected but possible (5-20% probability) possible None May occur at some point (20-50% probability) likely None Probably will occur (50-80% probability) almost_certain None Expected to occur in most circumstances (> 80% probability)

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description likelihood Assessed likelihood of risk occurrence

docs.title: In Subsets
docs.text: • RiskManagement

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: LikelihoodRating
description: Qualitative likelihood scale for risk assessment.
in_subset:
- risk_management
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  rare:
    text: rare
    description: Highly unlikely to occur (< 5% probability).
    annotations:
      numeric_value:
        tag: numeric_value
        value: '1'
  unlikely:
    text: unlikely
    description: Not expected but possible (5-20% probability).
    annotations:
      numeric_value:
        tag: numeric_value
        value: '2'
  possible:
    text: possible
    description: May occur at some point (20-50% probability).
    annotations:
      numeric_value:
        tag: numeric_value
        value: '3'
  likely:
    text: likely
    description: Probably will occur (50-80% probability).
    annotations:
      numeric_value:
        tag: numeric_value
        value: '4'
  almost_certain:
    text: almost_certain
    description: Expected to occur in most circumstances (> 80% probability).
    annotations:
      numeric_value:
        tag: numeric_value
        value: '5'

  a requirement.

- Must react to control and correct the nonconformity
- Must deal with consequences
- Must evaluate need for action to eliminate causes

docs.title: Enum: RiskLevel
docs.text:
Qualitative risk rating derived from likelihood × impact analysis.

URI: iso27001:RiskLevel

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description very_low None Negligible risk requiring no immediate action low None Minor risk manageable through routine procedures medium None Moderate risk requiring management attention and planned controls high None Significant risk requiring priority treatment and escalation critical None Severe risk threatening organizational objectives; requires immediate executi...

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description inherent_risk_level Risk level before controls are applied residual_risk_level Risk level after controls are applied

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: RiskLevel
description: Qualitative risk rating derived from likelihood × impact analysis.
in_subset:
- risk_management
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  very_low:
    text: very_low
    description: Negligible risk requiring no immediate action.
  low:
    text: low
    description: Minor risk manageable through routine procedures.
  medium:
    text: medium
    description: Moderate risk requiring management attention and planned controls.
  high:
    text: high
    description: Significant risk requiring priority treatment and escalation.
  critical:
    text: critical
    description: Severe risk threatening organizational objectives; requires immediate
      executive action and resource allocation.

docs.title: Subset: RiskManagement
docs.text:
Elements supporting risk assessment (6.1.2) and risk treatment (6.1.3). Aligned with ISO 31000:2018 principles.

URI: RiskManagement

docs.title: Comments
docs.text:
• Includes risk identification, analysis, evaluation, and treatment
  • Links risks to controls and residual risk acceptance

docs.text:
name: RiskTreatmentOption
annotations:
  iso31000_reference:
    tag: iso31000_reference
    value: Clause 6.5
description: Standard risk treatment options per ISO 31000 and ISO 27005.
in_subset:
- risk_management
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  modify:
    text: modify
    description: Apply controls to change the risk level (reduce likelihood or impact).
    aliases:
    - mitigate
    - reduce
  accept:
    text: accept
    description: Accept the risk without further treatment, within risk appetite.
      Requires risk owner approval.
    aliases:
    - retain
  avoid:
    text: avoid
    description: Eliminate the risk by removing the activity or asset that creates
      it.
    aliases:
    - terminate
  share:
    text: share
    description: Transfer or share risk with external parties (e.g., insurance, outsourcing).
    aliases:
    - transfer

    comments:
    - Examples include draft, approved, active, superseded, archived
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
    rank: 1000
    alias: status
    owner: TopicSpecificPolicy
    domain_of:
    - DocumentedInformation
    - Nonconformity
    - CorrectiveAction
    - ImprovementOpportunity
    range: string
  classification:
    name: classification
    description: Information classification level.
    comments:
    - Per A.5.12, classification based on confidentiality, integrity, availability
    examples:
    - value: confidential
    - value: internal
    - value: public
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
    rank: 1000
    alias: classification
    owner: TopicSpecificPolicy
    domain_of:
    - DocumentedInformation
    - Asset
    range: string
  retention_period:
    name: retention_period
    description: Duration for which the document must be retained.
    comments:
    - Per 7.5.3 f) retention and disposition
    - Use ISO 8601 duration notation such as P1Y or P90D
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
    rank: 1000
    alias: retention_period
    owner: TopicSpecificPolicy
    domain_of:
    - DocumentedInformation
    range: duration type
  id:
    name: id
    description: Unique identifier for this entity instance.
    comments:
    - Should use consistent URI/CURIE format across the dataset
    examples:
    - value: iso27001:risk-001
    - value: iso27001:control-5.1
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
    rank: 1000
    identifier: true
    alias: id
    owner: TopicSpecificPolicy
    domain_of:
    - NamedEntity
    range: uriorcurie
    required: true
  name:
    name: name
    description: Human-readable name or title.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
    rank: 1000
    alias: name
    owner: TopicSpecificPolicy
    domain_of:
    - NamedEntity
    range: string
    required: true
  description:
    name: description
    description: Detailed description of the entity.
    comments:
    - Should provide sufficient detail for understanding without external reference
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
    rank: 1000
    alias: description
    owner: TopicSpecificPolicy
    domain_of:
    - NamedEntity
    range: string
  created_date:
    name: created_date
    description: Date when the entity was created.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
    rank: 1000
    alias: created_date
    owner: TopicSpecificPolicy
    domain_of:
    - NamedEntity
    range: date
  modified_date:
    name: modified_date
    description: Date when the entity was last modified.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
    rank: 1000
    alias: modified_date
    owner: TopicSpecificPolicy
    domain_of:
    - NamedEntity
    range: date
  version:
    name: version
    description: Version identifier for the entity.
    comments:
    - Supports document control requirements per 7.5.3 e)
    examples:
    - value: '1.0'
    - value: 2.3.1
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
    rank: 1000
    alias: version
    owner: TopicSpecificPolicy
    domain_of:
    - NamedEntity
    range: string

docs.title: iso27001
docs.text:
A comprehensive LinkML schema modeling the requirements, clauses, and Annex A controls of ISO/IEC 27001:2022. Designed for open data publication, automated validation, and integration with governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) systems. This schema captures: - ISMS lifecycle (establish, implement, maintain, improve) - Risk assessment and treatment processes (Clause 6.1) - All 93 Annex A controls organized by domain - Audit, measurement, and continual improvement artifacts

URI: https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso-iec-27001
